detail.description:
Dive into the official game of Shark Week with Hungry Shark Evolution! Become the ultimate predator in this offline shark game where you’ll rule the ocean and eat your way through an underwater world of adventure 🦈🦈🦈🦈
 
Take control of a mighty, hungry shark and survive as long as possible by eating everything in sight! In this thrilling, classic arcade-style shark game, evolve your predator into a fierce sea beast, from Great Whites to the ferocious Megalodon, and explore the ocean’s depths
detail.recentChanges:
HUNGRY SHARK X DAVE THE DIVER
Dave and his crew have docked in shark-infested waters! Escort and protect Dave to gather fresh ingredients for Bancho and keep the restaurant running. Complete daily requests to unlock exclusive rewards like Bancho’s Knife, and even Dave himself!
